steps.title: Extract solutions from the factored equation
steps.content:
The equation $7x^2(4x - 13)(4x - u) = 0$ is a product equal to zero, so each factor can be set to zero:
  • From $x^2 = 0$: $x = 0$
  • From $4x - 13 = 0$: $x = \frac{13}{4}$
  • From $4x - u = 0$: $x = \frac{u}{4}$

steps.title: Apply the sum-of-solutions condition
steps.content:
We're told the sum of all solutions equals 9. Add the three solutions:
$$0 + \frac{13}{4} + \frac{u}{4} = 9$$
Combine the fractions with a common denominator:
$$\frac{13 + u}{4} = 9$$

steps.title: Solve for u
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 4:
$$13 + u = 36$$
$$u = 23$$
The answer is 23.
